name: All Set Restaurant & Bar

notes: Every frozen row was reconciled against All Set's restaurant-issued online ordering menu and nine current restaurant-issued PDF menus.
The corrected catalog contains 104 food and nonalcoholic formulations represented by 131 retained source presentations across 17 canonical categories.

The frozen extraction contained 13 ordering modifiers or truncated fragments as products, represented seven size or service-period duplicates separately, and omitted 23 current formulations published only in the PDF menu set.
Alcohol-only cocktails, beer, wine, and spirits are outside this catalog. Current mocktails, zero-proof beer, soft drinks, coffee, espresso, and tea are retained as nonalcoholic products.

The nine one-page PDFs were rendered and visually reviewed in addition to text extraction; the wine-only PDF was reviewed to confirm it adds no food or nonalcoholic formulation beyond the beverage menu.
All Set publishes current item names and selected fixed ingredient descriptions, but no complete recipe-level allergen matrix, shared-fryer disclosure, or cross-contact policy.
Sixty-six current formulations have positive contains signals supported by fixed restaurant-published ingredients or unavoidable named formats; 38 remain unavailable for fixed allergen data.
Of 101 frozen rows, 37 allergen results were wrong: 27 underreported fixed signals, six overreported unsupported signals, and four both omitted fixed signals and asserted false positives.

Lexical false positives were removed: oyster mushrooms are not shellfish, and pecan-smoked bacon does not establish tree nuts. Fish was removed from lobster-roll rows because lobster is shellfish, not fish.

Optional choices such as wing dressings are not promoted into fixed claims. Absent source detail remains unavailable rather than being treated as allergen-free, and no unsupported may-contain or safety claim is created.
The frozen generic extraction mixed product objects with nested modifier objects from the Owner ordering payload and retained only a partial view of the restaurant's PDF menu set.

The source payload distinguishes products with prices and categories from nested modifier objects; all Extra-prefixed rows, Blue Cheese & Ranch, and the truncated platter-upcharge fragment are excluded as nonproducts.

The correction consolidates verified duplicate sizes and service-period names while preserving their aliases and exact source presentations, then overlays the current restaurant-issued PDFs for completeness and ingredient semantics.
The shared row classifier now respects explicit Non-Alcoholic, Mocktails, and Zero Proof categories so current mocktails and coffee are not mistaken for alcohol-list bleed.
A guarded repair requires exact item, category, source-type, unavailable-count, and critical allergen invariants before replacing the frozen restaurant entry.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Reviewed the retained restaurant-issued Owner ordering-page capture and its structured product/modifier payload; the current live endpoint returned access-control responses during the audit.
notes: The retained 2026-06-25 HTML artifact is 1,359,183 bytes with SHA-256 084f6e19d1f03a6bd0cc93b9c288630662146a1a1b9a15d1bafdc1d0084af55c.
The corresponding frozen source snapshot reports a last-known-good extraction at 2026-06-26T16:32:00.231Z.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Located and captured nine current restaurant-issued Owner PDFs covering Kids, Desserts, Lunch, Daily, Happy Hour, Brunch, Weekly Bar Features, Beverages, and Wine; all nine were text-extracted, rendered, and visually reviewed.
notes: The official menu index identifies the Daily Menu as effective March 17, 2026.
The PDF set supplies 23 current food and nonalcoholic formulations missing from the frozen catalog.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Found fixed ingredient descriptions and GF/V labels but no complete allergen matrix, recipe corpus, shared-equipment statement, or cross-contact policy.
notes: Positive fixed signals therefore stop at published ingredients and unavoidable named formats; unsupported rows remain unavailable.

findings.summary: The frozen 101-row catalog included 13 nested ordering modifiers or truncated fragments as if they were standalone menu products and omitted 23 current PDF-published formulations.
findings.resolution: Removed all 13 nonproduct rows, consolidated seven duplicate formulations, restored 23 current formulations, and rebuilt a 104-formulation current catalog.

findings.summary: Thirty-seven frozen allergen results were wrong due to omitted fixed ingredients, optional-choice promotion, and lexical confusion such as oyster mushrooms and pecan-smoked bacon.
findings.resolution: Corrected 27 underreports, six overreports, and four mixed errors; retained 66 evidence-backed fixed-positive formulations and kept 38 unsupported formulations unavailable.

findings.summary: The generic extraction flattened Owner product/modifier structure, failed to reconcile size and service-period variants, and did not cover the complete current PDF menu set.
findings.resolution: Prepared a captured-source catalog with explicit nonproduct exclusions, canonical alias consolidation, PDF completeness overlay, fixed-ingredient semantics, and guarded replacement invariants.

repairs.summary: Prepared and focused-tested a 104-formulation, 131-presentation All Set catalog with 66 fixed-positive rows, 38 unavailable rows, and all 101 frozen rows terminally reconciled.
verificationCommands: RESTAURANT_REPOSITORY_PATH=tmp/all-set-audit/repository.json node scripts/repair-final-generated-regressions.mjs (isolated copy; verified 104 items, 17 categories, 66 fixed-positive rows, 38 unavailable rows, critical allergen corrections, and identical SHA-256 after a second repair run)

notes: Corrected snapshot SHA-256: 59a49eb1e8f4c46c9b45217bae329ec1c36fb3dc68f33f909ecaa9566231859d.

Reconciliation counts: {"dispositions":{"exact_match":54,"artifact":13,"variant_match":34},"allergens":{"mismatch":37,"not_applicable":13,"accurately_unavailable":23,"verified":28},"mismatchKinds":{"underreported":27,"overreported":6,"mixed":4}}.
Current corrected catalog counts: 104 formulations, 131 presentations, 17 canonical categories, 66 fixed-positive rows, and 38 unavailable rows.
